<?php namespace Illuminate\Console\Events; use Illuminate\Console\Scheduling\Event; use Throwable; class ScheduledTaskFailed { /** * Create a new event instance. * * @param \Illuminate\Console\Scheduling\Event $task The scheduled event that failed. * @param \Throwable $exception The exception that was thrown. */ public function __construct( public Event $task, public Throwable $exception, ) { } }
